x.summary:
New Anthropic Science Blog: Making Claude a chemist.

To manipulate a molecule, chemists first need to understand its structure. Their main tool is NMR spectroscopy.

We found Opus 4.7 matches—and on some tasks beats—dedicated NMR software. Read more: https://t.co/1jUvz7wdhV

x.title: NitroGen just won CVPR Best Paper Honorable Mention!! We are making strides towards general-purpose embodied agents that
x.summary:
NitroGen just won CVPR Best Paper Honorable Mention!! We are making strides towards general-purpose embodied agents that master not only the real world physics, but also all possible physics across a multiverse of simulations. 

It’s been 4 years since MineDojo, our first embodied agent in Minecraft, won NeurIPS Best Paper. Congrats to everyone on the team!!

videos.title: Build Small Hackathon
videos.summary:
The pace of AI over the last year has been anxiety-inducing. Labs release larger and larger models that do more of the things that make us feel human — writing, drawing, speaking, coding. No wonder more than half of us think the risks of AI outweigh the benefits.

We're sponsoring a hackathon to take things back to how they felt in 2021 — when models were small enough to tinker with, and the vibe was fun and hopeful about how this technology could improve our lives.

This hackathon is different. Rather than using a giant LLM to ship yet another B2B SaaS, we want you to think small. Armed with only 32 billion parameters, solve a problem someone you know is facing — or build something whimsical.
videos.author: Hugging Face

videos.title: Introducing Sites in Codex
videos.summary:
Sites in Codex lets anyone on your team turn an idea into a secure application and publish it in minutes. Build internal tools, mini apps, and shareable resources with hosting, authentication, storage, and database support included.

See how teams can use Sites to prepare for executive business reviews, upcoming events, and internal investment decisions, and more and then share and refine those apps across their workspace.
videos.author: OpenAI
